comment: 60yo male, 25 years as industrial painter (construction + ship-painting tradesman, pre-1990s solvent-heavy formulations), no current malignancy. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = IND-OCC-PAINTERS-PREVENTION-INTENSIFIED-SURVEILLANCE (LDCT chest if smoker-eligible + urinalysis q1-2y + CBC q1y + smoking-cessation counseling); alternative = IND-OCC-PAINTERS-PREVENTION-OBSERVATION (USPSTF general-population only). Validates v0.3 RF-OCC-PAINTERS-PREVENTION pilot (lung/bladder/AML risk).
